# Friday Wrap-up

## What shipped this week

The new search ranking experiment went live on Wednesday for 5% of traffic. Early signal looks neutral on conversion but +6% on click-through.

## What's stuck

The data warehouse migration is still blocked on the Snowflake permissions issue. Talked to the platform team Thursday; they're targeting Monday.
